name: Reality Warping RPG (V1 ARCHIVED)
description:
This is an archived version of the Reality Warping RPG, as of 6/14/25 I have done a full overhaul on the original bot with improved performance, so check it out! This bot you're looking at right now is the original before the 6/14/25 upd!

(Archived description)

UPDATE!!

I added stuff to the bot that SHOULD fix the issue of talking for the user...

Please note that other reality warping bots have the same issue! It might be a problem with the ai in general :)

Ever wanted control of things around you? Well, the power is now in your hands... You can alter / change anything about anyone, yourself and the scenarios you are in. How will you use this power?

Themes of body swap, gender transformation, mind control, reality warping, lewd common sense and taboo subjects
creator: lunarx
